constraints: Loop until no high or middle findings remain
payload.provisionalDecisionPolicy: Do not stop for user confirmation. Choose conservative generally preferable specifications and document each provisional decision for later review.

payload.designSummary: Initial design covering author, deep reviewer, broad reviewer, and final output.
keyDecisions: Any high or middle finding routes back to Node 1.
edgeCaseCoverage: Initial coverage is incomplete for ambiguous reviewer output.

provisionalDecisions.decision: Use high and middle findings as the blocking threshold.
provisionalDecisions.confirmationNeed: The user did not specify whether low findings should block acceptance.
provisionalDecisions.rationale: High and middle are material enough to require revision; low findings can be preserved as residual risks.
provisionalDecisions.revisitPath: Change the severity threshold if the user later wants stricter review.

payload.designSummary: Revised design with explicit reviewer adapter JSON and routing booleans.
keyDecisions: Node 2 and Node 3 both return when.needs_revision and payload.needs_revision.
Only high and middle findings block final acceptance.
edgeCaseCoverage: Ambiguous reviewer output routes to revision.
Low severity findings are preserved as residual risks.
crossFeatureImpacts: Package registry entry and README summary stay in sync.
addressedFeedback: Clarified reviewer adapter output and routing behavior.

provisionalDecisions.decision: Low findings do not block final acceptance.
provisionalDecisions.confirmationNeed: The user did not specify the treatment of low findings.
provisionalDecisions.rationale: The requested loop only mentions high and middle findings as blockers.
provisionalDecisions.revisitPath: Promote low findings to blocking if a future run requires exhaustive cleanup.

residualRisks: Future workflows may want a configurable severity threshold.

findings.message: The design does not state how reviewer output drives loop routing when output is ambiguous.
findings.recommendedChange: Require reviewer adapter JSON with an explicit needs_revision boolean.

feedback: Require Node 2 and Node 3 to emit when.needs_revision and payload.needs_revision.

residualLowRisks: Future workflows may want a configurable severity threshold.

payload.designSummary: Accepted design workflow with one author, one deep reviewer, one broad reviewer, one adversarial reviewer, and revision loops for high or middle findings.
payload.deepReviewSummary: One middle finding was fixed, then the deep review accepted.
payload.broadReviewSummary: Broad review accepted with no high or middle findings.
payload.adversarialReviewSummary: Adversarial review accepted with no high or middle findings.

provisionalDecisions.decision: Low findings do not block final acceptance.
provisionalDecisions.confirmationNeed: The user did not specify the treatment of low findings.
provisionalDecisions.rationale: The requested loop only mentions high and middle findings as blockers.
provisionalDecisions.revisitPath: Promote low findings to blocking if a future run requires exhaustive cleanup.

residualLowRisks: Future workflows may want a configurable severity threshold.
recommendedNextSteps: Use the accepted design as input for implementation planning.
